title: Constants
description: Shared geographic constants for AcoreX. Provides a typed country dataset (names, regions, ISO codes, dialing codes, phone masks, validation regex, optional area codes, and flag sprite positions) plus a base64 flag sprite image used by phone and country pickers.

hints.title: Field naming
hints.content: In the dataset, code is the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 identifier in lowercase (e.g. 'ir', 'us'). The property iso2code stores the international dialing prefix (e.g. '+98', '+1').

hints.title: Built-in consumers
hints.content: The ax-phone-box component and AXOverlayService-based UI layers consume COUNTRIES and COUNTRIES_FLAG_BASE64 internally. Import these constants directly when building custom country selectors, phone parsers, or validation logic.

types.title: COUNTRIES
types.description: Read-only array of all supported countries (version 1.2.0).

types.title: COUNTRIES_FLAG_BASE64
types.description: Base64-encoded PNG sprite containing all country flags.

props.name: COUNTRIES_FLAG_BASE64
props.description: Data URL (data:image/png;base64,...) used as background-image together with bkPosition on each CountryItem.

types.title: CountryItem
types.description: Metadata for a single country, used for phone input, formatting, validation, and flag rendering.

props.name: code
props.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code in lowercase (e.g. 'ir', 'us', 'ar'). Used for filtering and lookup.

props.name: format
props.description: National number display pattern where '0' represents a digit placeholder (e.g. '000 000 0000').

props.name: mask
props.description: Input mask pattern where '#' represents a digit placeholder (e.g. '### ### ####').

props.name: regex
props.description: Regular expression (as string) for validating the formatted national number.

props.name: orderPriority?
props.description: Optional sort priority. Lower values appear higher in sorted lists.

props.name: areaCodes?
props.description: Optional list of national area codes (e.g. ['11', '221'] for Argentina).

props.name: bkPosition?
props.description: CSS background-position coordinates for this country's flag inside COUNTRIES_FLAG_BASE64.

content.data:
The @acorex/core/constants entry point exports a single curated dataset for countries worldwide. Each CountryItem includes everything needed to build phone inputs, country dropdowns, and flag icons without maintaining your own country list.

COUNTRIES is a static array — import it and filter or search at runtime. COUNTRIES_FLAG_BASE64 is a single sprite image; each country's bkPosition tells you where to clip the flag inside that sprite.

sections.title: Basic Usage
sections.description: Import the static dataset and use CountryItem fields for lookup, phone input, validation, and flag rendering.

sections.title: Lookup and Filter
sections.description: Find countries by ISO code, region, or dialing prefix.

sections.title: Sorting by Priority
sections.description: Sort countries for dropdowns using orderPriority.

sections.title: Phone Number Parsing
sections.description: Detect country from a full international number — the same approach used by AXPhoneBoxComponent.

sections.title: Validation with regex
sections.description: Validate a formatted national number using the country regex pattern.

sections.title: Rendering Flags
sections.description: Display country flags using the sprite image and bkPosition.

sections.title: Using with Select Box
sections.description: Map COUNTRIES to a data source for ax-select-box or similar components.

sections.title: Custom CountryItem
sections.description: Shape of a single country entry for reference or extension.
